labels.notes: Shirley Lorraine Muir 2:46pm — long session (3.5 hrs / 29630 words) reflecting multiple in-room/out-of-room cycles. Billing extraction on merged SOAP successfully DROPPED 3 hallucinated conditions (DiabeticAssessment, DiabetesManagement, PrimaryMentalHealth — 'keyword absent from SOAP') via the v0.10.68 condition_keyword_guard.
